transcript: Speaker A: भैया, चांदनी चौक जाने का कितना लोगे? [Brother, how much will you take to go to Chandni Chowk?] Speaker B: It will be around 100 rupees. 100. Speaker A: 100 rupees तो थोड़ा ज़्यादा है भैया। [100 rupees is a bit too much, brother.] Speaker B: If you can't afford, then find some other rickshaw, please. Speaker A: अच्छा भैया ये बताओ, I have been trying to make my boyfriend learn English, but I can't. फिर आपने कैसे सीख ली? [Okay brother, tell me this, I have been trying to make my boyfriend learn English, but I can't. Then how did you learn?] Speaker B: वो मैं MySivi ऐप यूज़ करता हूँ ना। MySivi. [That's because I use the MySivi app. MySivi.] Speaker A: MySivi ऐप? वो क्या है? [MySivi app? What is that?] Speaker B: इस ऐप में एक AI टीचर है, जिसके साथ हर दिन 10-15 मिनट प्रैक्टिस करके मैंने इंग्लिश सीख ली। [In this app, there is an AI teacher, with whom I practiced for 10-15 minutes every day and learned English.] Speaker A: अरे वाह! पर ये AI तो महँगा होगा ना? [Oh wow! But this AI must be expensive, right?] Speaker B: बिल्कुल नहीं। मैंने बस 1 रुपये में शुरू किया था। तो अपने बॉयफ्रेंड को भी करवा दो। [Not at all. I started with just 1 rupee. So get your boyfriend to do it too.] Speaker A: ज़रूर भैया। कैसे स्टार्ट करूँ? [Sure brother. How do I start?] Speaker B: बस इंस्टॉल बटन पे क्लिक करो, MySivi ऐप इंस्टॉल करो, एंड 15 डेज़ इंग्लिश लर्निंग चैलेंज शुरू करो। [Just click on the install button, install the MySivi app, and start the 15 days English learning challenge.] Speaker C: इंस्टॉल नाओ पे क्लिक करो और MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Click on install now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: Chandni Chawk, It Will Be Around, 100 Rupees 100, Rupees Tho Thoda, If You Cant Afford, Other Rickshow, I Have Been Trying, To Make My Boyfriend, Learn English, But I Can't, Phir Aapne Kaise, Seekh Li, MySivi, Hoon Na Mysivi, Iss App Me Ek AI, Teacher Hai Kiske, Sath Har Din 10-15, Par Ye Ai To Menhga, Bilkul Nahi, To Apne Boyfriend, Kaise Start Karun, Bas Install Button, Mysivi App Install, And 15 Days English, MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: A woman is surprised when a rickshaw driver speaks fluent English. He explains he learned it using the MySivi app's AI teacher for just 1 rupee. The ad ends with a call to action to download the app and start a 15-day challenge.
